title: Pompelmo's HD texture pack
description: Enhancing the Vanilla Textures to 512x512px, all compleatly free :)
body:
This is a 512x realistic texture pack currently in early development.
At the moment, around 10 textures are completed, and more are coming regularly.

The goal of this pack is to create a clean, realistic look while keeping Minecraft’s original style and readability.
## 
-------------------------------
## **Development Philosophy:
**
High resolution (512x)

Realistic but still Minecraft-feeling

Clean tiling and consistent materials

Optimized for high-end PCs

Works best with shaders

------------------------------------------------

I post development updates on YouTube and Instagram, and many textures are made based on community suggestions.

If you want to influence what gets made next, feel free to leave feedback.

This pack grows together with the community.
